document.title: Detector(자사_1G)구매_20191018.xlsx
document.documentType: Detector parts list / bill of materials extract

sourceSummary.oneLine: BOM-style detector purchase list covering S4335-W and S4343-W assemblies, including electronics, labels, packaging, power supply, battery, harnesses, and board-level components.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports DHF/DMR design and purchasing traceability by identifying detector assemblies, part codes, quantities, specifications, units, supplier part numbers, and regulatory/safety-marked parts.
keyPoints: S4343-W section includes a printing date of 2019-08-12 and a header for Level, Parts Code, quantity, part name, specification, unit, and supplier part number.
S4343-W detector assembly includes power-related parts such as a DEPS9601 AC/DC 48 W power supply marked UL and a power cord listing CEE/EAC/ISC/SNI.
Harness entries include IEC60332-1 and CAT7 references, relevant to cable safety and network performance.

Board and panel assemblies list ROIC, gate driver, TFT sensor panel, ROIC board, solder cream, regulators, clock drivers, capacitors, resistors, inductors, connectors, switches, and ferrite/EMI parts.
S4335-W entries include MAIN PCB revision R1 and an SDR-C4335W Li-ion polymer battery specification.

entities.name: S4343-W

entities.evidence: MI13-01009A is listed as "IC DRIVER GATE-GATE IC,"HX5090-ACS22D,COF,LINE,40,520,68um,40.24mm X 23mm"".

entities.name: SDB-3S1PA

concepts.name: Detector bill of materials traceability
concepts.evidence: Rows list Level, Parts Code, quantity, part name, specification, unit, and supplier P/N for S4343-W and S4335-W detector assemblies.

concepts.name: Power supply safety marking
concepts.evidence: SMPS-2G_DETECTOR_POWER_BOX specification ends with "UL" and includes AC/DC, 48W, AC220V, 50-60Hz, DC16V, +10to+40C.

concepts.name: Power cord certification marks
concepts.evidence: POWER CORD-DT specification includes "CEE/EAC/ ISC/SNI" with EUR 2P-S, 250V, 10A, H05VV-F 3x0.75mm2, C13 connector.

concepts.name: Detector imaging panel assembly
concepts.evidence: ASSY BOARD/MECHA-PANEL ASSY is specified as "S4343W,TETD PANEL ASSY" and includes TFT-SENSOR PANEL FM4343S-D6S/A.

concepts.name: ROIC board electronics
concepts.evidence: ASSY I/F BD-RO is identified as "S4343-W ROIC BOARD" and contains ASIC-ROIC AD71140JCFZ, CMOS logic, clock driver, voltage reference, regulators, resistors, and capacitors.

evidence.claim: The chunk contains a S4343-W detector BOM section with a printing date of 2019-08-12.
evidence.evidenceText: "S4343-W (MI90-02026B)" followed by "Printing Date : 2019-08-12" and column header "Level,Parts Code,수량,품명,Spec.,단위,업체 P/N".

evidence.claim: S4343-W detector assembly part MI90-02025C is listed as the female detector assembly.
The S4343-W assembly includes an AC/DC detector power box using DEPS9601, rated 48 W, AC220V 50-60 Hz input, DC16V output, +10 to +40 C, with UL marking.
The listed detector power cord includes multiple regional marks or certifications: CEE, EAC, ISC, and SNI.
The signal harness references IEC60332-1, a cable flame propagation standard.
The LAN harness is specified as CAT7 with 8P, 3000 mm length, 26 AWG, and 8P8C connectors.
The S4343-W panel assembly uses a TFT sensor panel identified as FM4343S-D6S/A with 520x520 +0.6 mm specification.
The S4343-W panel assembly includes 12 AD71140JCFZ ROIC ASICs rated for 5 V and 0 to 70 C.
The S4343-W panel assembly includes 6 HX5090-ACS22D gate driver ICs.
The S4343-W ROIC board assembly MI92-02138A includes an SMD assembly measuring 416.7 x 66.7 x 1.2 mm.
evidence.evidenceText: "MI92-02138A,1,ASSY I/F BD-RO,S4343-W ROIC BOARD" and "MI94-01007A,1,ASSY SMD,"S4343-W ROIC BOARD,416.7x66.7x1.2,MI92-02138A"".

evidence.claim: The S4335-W section lists a main PCB revision R1 using part code MI41-01681A.
The S4335-W-related battery entry identifies SDR-C4335W as a Li-ion polymer battery rated 3400 mAh, -0 to 60 C, and 380 g.
The S4343-W assembly includes packaging and labeling items, including detector ID labels and caution labels.
The BOM includes EMI or signal integrity components such as ferrite cores and bead-SMD parts.
evidence.evidenceText: S4343-W assembly lists "CORE-FERRITE,29.2x42x29.4mm" and repeated bead entries such as "BEAD-SMD,"60ohm/100Mhz..."" and "BEAD-SMD,"600ohm/100Mhz..."".

evidence.claim: The BOM includes timing components for board operation, including 32.768 kHz, 24 MHz, 25 MHz crystals and 50 MHz oscillators.

reviewFlags.reason: This is chunk 2 of 22 and begins mid-table, so initial rows may lack their section heading and column header within this chunk.
The source is an Excel-derived BOM/purchase list with many repeated component rows; duplicate entries likely reflect multiple uses or repeated extraction rows.

Authority and jurisdiction values are inferred only from part specifications containing marks such as UL and CEE/EAC/ISC/SNI; no regulatory submission or certificate document number appears in this chunk.
